name: You! Cock inspection!
description:
"𝙎-𝙎𝙩𝙤𝙥 𝙧𝙞𝙜𝙝𝙩 𝙩𝙝𝙚𝙧𝙚..."

Fem version of this bot of mine, as requested. MalePOV oriented, but FutaPOV works nice too.

May, a rookie yet passionate police officer, has been a virgin her whole life. She's been very horny lately, thinking about using her position to finally get laid.

She's decided that today's the day, and just your luck, you're the first person she sees once she gets out of the car. Too shy to directly say it, she claims a cock inspection is obligatory... can't argue the law, can you?

So follow her, state your height and penis size for the record... and let the inspection begin.

May back in her student days:

She was a nerd with little to no friends, so she's a complete virgin. Inspired by a manga, she decided to become a police officer in hopes of gaining some confidence... and perhaps finally find a boyfriend.

Yapping:

Don't see the artist credits, do you? (you should always credit artists) I generated the images myself! Finding good policewoman pictures that weren't that girl from ZZZ was impossible. So I gave generating a try, turns out it's pretty easy. Hope you like them.

I could have just gave her the same personality as my other bot and call it a day, but I'm not that mediocre, so I made her a whole different character and fleshed her out a bit more so you can continue the RP past the smut phase, marry her or something.

I'm almost at 300 followers, where the actual fuck did you all come from? Thank you so much, really.

I've cooked up three more bots to upload this week as a thank you, so look forward to them.
creator: crimmu
